title: lol GAINAX
wikitext:
[]: lol GAINAX             Quote Post by cat42 » Thu Feb 01, 2007 1:31 am I remember a while ago that the topic of Eva sex dolls were brought up. Well, GAINAX has just gotten one step closer to that line http://www.evastore.jp/index.cgi?rm=detail&id=900 1/1 MOVING FIGURE 綾波レイ（ペーパームーン）

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Feb 01, 2007 2:31 am Oh god! Delicious doll joints.

[]: ^_^ \/,,             Quote Post by chiefen » Thu Feb 01, 2007 4:00 am STICK IT IN HER PO... doll joints?!

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Thu Feb 01, 2007 4:35 am is that what Rei would look like in Rozen Maiden

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Feb 01, 2007 8:10 am This is totally older than the hills, and I know it's been brought up several times on this board in the past. There is also an Asuka version in school uniform and sun dress.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Thu Feb 01, 2007 2:51 pm The "moving figure" is new (the Rei one), new at least for Evastore. The 2 Asuka ones are mannequin (sp?) like, very little articulation. This one brings joints on the knees and something about moving fingers. And it was presented on Evastore on december or first days of january.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Feb 01, 2007 3:50 pm What really pisses me off about that Asuka summer dress doll, is first that release that, then several months later, they relase the SAME THING expect she's wearing a BLACK DRESS NOW. Talk about milking the cash cow! :roll: As an aside, I want that Asuka summer version doll. Too bad it costs $50, IIRC. :shock: (I'm just a poor college student, damn it! ) Now this is just wrong: (Although whatever happened to that "Finger to the fans that fap to Asuka & Rei"? Or is that just some unfounded theory with part of the reason why the masturbation scene was included?)

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Thu Feb 01, 2007 4:09 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Now this is just wrong:

[]:             Quote Post by Kyle » Thu Feb 01, 2007 9:14 pm "Pull my hair daddy" Damn thats hot.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Feb 01, 2007 10:10 pm Kyle wrote: Damn thats hot.

[]:             Quote Post by ThroneofDravaris » Thu Feb 01, 2007 11:06 pm I wish I hadn't thought of Sexy Losers when I saw this.

[]:             Quote Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Thu Feb 01, 2007 11:30 pm I'm still waiting for this 1/1 scale model http://i120.photobucket.com/albums/o173/KatayokunoTenshi_01/NGE/1to1Scale.jpg Not really

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Feb 01, 2007 11:33 pm Katayoku no Tenshi wrote: I'm still waiting for this 1/1 scale model http://i120.photobucket.com/albums/o173/KatayokunoTenshi_01/NGE/1to1Scale.jpg Not really

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Fri Feb 02, 2007 9:43 am It may be hot not really but it sure ain't Asuka. I've got nothing against people taking advantage of the horny/loney fanboys/girls out there but at least make the doll look like the actual character before you screw them out of their money.

[]: Re: lol GAINAX             Quote Post by ORAMI!? » Fri Feb 02, 2007 11:12 am cat42 wrote: I remember a while ago that the topic of Eva sex dolls were brought up. Well, GAINAX has just gotten one step closer to that line http://www.evastore.jp/index.cgi?rm=detail&id=900 1/1 MOVING FIGURE ?????????????

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Fri Feb 02, 2007 12:16 pm This is just... Strange. I'm not quite sure what the proper reaction would be. :? This looks like something they'd use as a decoration at an Anime store. I'd like to think that potential for abuse is reduced since they're most likely made out of hard plastic , but you never know with perverted Japanese men... If they make one made out of soft, flesh-like material and smoothed over joints, that will truly be cause for alarm.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Feb 02, 2007 12:18 pm Hunter21 wrote: It may be hot not really but it sure ain't Asuka. I've got nothing against people taking advantage of the horny/loney fanboys/girls out there but at least make the doll look like the actual character before you screw them out of their money.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Feb 02, 2007 12:29 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Hell, Asuka ain't blonde or brunette, she's a freaking REDHEAD! Get it right, damn it!

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Fri Feb 02, 2007 1:34 pm But is the market for these things really big enough to justify making them? Sailor Star Dust wrote: "ain't"

[]: Re: lol GAINAX             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Feb 02, 2007 1:47 pm ORAMI!? wrote: At that price (about US$4000), just fork out a couple grand more for a custom-made no-I-am-not-going-to-post-the-link -RealDoll and get it over with.
